title: Digital solutions
subtitle: Websites, applications, design or consulting — I accompany you from idea to realization.

description.all: Discover all my services for your digital presence
description.web: From showcase sites to complex web applications, performant and scalable
description.mobile: Native and hybrid applications for iOS and Android
description.design: Intuitive interfaces and memorable user experiences
description.consulting: Technical and strategic advice for your digital projects
description.maintenance: Monitoring, updates and continuous technical support

items.question: What is the average duration of a project?
items.answer: Each project moves at its own pace. Allow 1 to 2 weeks for a showcase website, 3 to 6 weeks for an e-commerce site, and 2 to 4 months for a custom application. The essential thing? A result that truly reflects you, with no compromise on quality.

items.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the result?
items.answer: Your satisfaction is my only finish line. If any detail doesn't meet your expectations, I improve it without limits until the result exceeds them. That's why my partners are so positive about my work.

items.question: Do you provide support after delivery?
items.answer: Absolutely. One month of support is included to assist you after launch. And if needed, maintenance packages are available to ensure the longevity of your project.

items.question: Can I make changes during the project?
items.answer: Of course! We work in stages with regular checkpoints. Your project evolves with your ideas, and I adapt to keep it perfectly aligned with your vision.

items.question: Are the displayed prices final?
items.answer: They are indicative bases. Since each project is unique, I provide a custom quote after understanding your needs, ambitions, and budget.

items.question: How does the initial consultation work?
items.answer: Free and with no obligation, it lasts about 30 minutes. It's the perfect time to discuss your goals, your ideas, and see together if our collaboration makes sense.

cta.title: Can't find what you're looking for?

disclaimer: * Prices are indicative. Each project receives a personalized quote.
